title: Daily Routines
shortSummary: Describe your day from morning to night, including the reflexive verbs French uses constantly.
culturalNote: Daily life in France often centres on meals, with a real lunch break in the middle of the day and dinner later in the evening, around eight. Many routine actions, like getting up and getting dressed, use reflexive verbs. Sundays are quieter, with many shops closed, and people favour long walks, markets, and family meals.

keyPhrases.native: Je me lève à sept heures
keyPhrases.pronunciation: zhuh muh LEV ah set UHR

grammar.explanation: Many daily actions are reflexive in French: se lever (get up), se coucher (go to bed), se reposer (rest). The reflexive pronoun matches the subject: je me lève, tu te lèves.
grammar.commonMistake: Dropping the reflexive pronoun: it is je me lève, not je lève.

grammar.explanation: Order your day with d'abord (first), puis or ensuite (then), and enfin (finally): D'abord je me lève, puis je prends le petit-déjeuner.

examples.native: D'abord je me douche, puis je m'habille.
examples.en: First I shower, then I get dressed.

grammar.commonMistake: Using et for every step. Sequencing words make the order clearer.

dialogue.setup: Two friends, Julie and Marc, compare their daily routines over coffee.

lines.speaker: Julie
lines.native: À quelle heure tu te lèves ?
lines.english: What time do you get up?

lines.speaker: Marc
lines.native: Je me lève à six heures et demie. Et toi ?
lines.english: I get up at half past six. And you?

lines.speaker: Julie
lines.native: À sept heures. Puis je vais au travail.
lines.english: At seven. Then I go to work.

lines.speaker: Marc
lines.native: Qu'est-ce que tu fais le soir ?
lines.english: What do you do in the evening?

lines.speaker: Julie
lines.native: Je prépare le dîner et je regarde la télé.
lines.english: I make dinner and watch TV.

lines.speaker: Marc
lines.native: Moi, je vais souvent courir le soir.
lines.english: I often go running in the evening.

quiz.question: Je _____ lève à sept heures. (reflexive pronoun)
quiz.explanation: se lever is reflexive: je me lève.

quiz.question: How do you say 'I have breakfast'?
quiz.explanation: prendre le petit-déjeuner means 'to have breakfast'.

quiz.question: Which word means 'then'?
quiz.explanation: puis means 'then'; d'abord is 'first', enfin is 'finally'.

quiz.question: Arrange: maison / la / rentre / à / je
quiz.explanation: Je rentre (I return) + à la maison (home).
